tool.name: BAMboozle
tool.description: removes genetic variation from BAM files to protect donor privacy
tool.command: ln -s '$input_bam' input.bam && ln -s '$input_bam.metadata.bam_index' input.bai && #if str($ref_source.ref_source_select) == "history" #if $ref_source.reference.is_of_type('fasta.gz') gunzip -c '$ref_source.reference' > reference.fa && #else ln -s '$ref_source.reference' reference.fa && #end if #else ln -s '$ref_source.reference.fields.path' reference.fa && #end if samtools faidx reference.fa && BAMboozle --bam input.bam --fa reference.fa --out '$output_bam' --p "\${GALAXY_SLOTS:-1}" $strict $keepsecondary $keepunmapped

param.name: ref_source_select
param.label: Choose the source for the reference genome

param.name: reference
param.label: Reference genome
param.help: The reference genome the BAM file was aligned against

validator.message: No built-in reference genomes are available

param.name: reference
param.label: Reference genome FASTA
param.help: The reference genome the BAM file was aligned against

param.label: Strict mode
param.help: Also sanitize mapping scores and auxiliary tags (e.g. AS/NH)

param.label: Keep secondary alignments
param.help: Retain secondary alignments in the output BAM

param.label: Keep unmapped reads
param.help: Retain unmapped reads in the output BAM

tool.help:
**What it does**
BAMboozle removes genetic variation from sequencing reads stored in a BAM file to protect the privacy and genetic information of donor individuals. It reconstructs each read's sequence from the supplied reference genome, discarding the donor-specific variants that would otherwise be recoverable from the aligned reads, while preserving the alignment and expression information needed for most downstream analyses.
-----
**Inputs**
- **Input BAM file** - aligned reads to be de-identified. - **Reference genome** - the genome the reads were aligned against, either a built-in genome or FASTA from your history.
**Options**
- **Strict mode** (``--strict``) - additionally sanitize mapping scores and auxiliary tags (e.g. ``AS`` / ``NH``) that could leak information. - **Keep secondary alignments** (``--keepsecondary``) - retain secondary alignments in the output. - **Keep unmapped reads** (``--keepunmapped``) - retain unmapped reads in the output.
-----
**Output**
A sanitized BAM file with genetic variation removed.
